violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Raw fish/shrimp product unthawing on the counter without running water.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Establishment uses chlorine sanitation for 3 sink system. They had both quat and lactic acid test strips on hand. They did not find any chlorine test strips at time of inspection

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair -Meat walk in cooler at the back of prep area has tiles missing and in need of repair.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
